message: Update to 1.3.4 — false red alert fixed, Grade-10 Science Behind, Performance FPS.
releaseNotes: 1.3.4 - Fixes false Bio-Synth ALERT on healthy heartbeat (MAP scale + crisis gate). Science Behind is Grade-10 step-by-step. Performance preset: fewer particles, no bloom/env, lighter materials. Standards: docs/SIM-MODULE-STANDARDS.md.
